# Contribution Guidelines

This repository is public for educational & collaborative discussions.

## Contribution Model

- 🚫 No direct pushes allowed.
- ✅ All code changes must come via Pull Requests (PRs).
- ✅ All PRs require review and approval by @ItsAsh95.
- ✅ Signed commits are mandatory.
- ✅ All commits undergo automated security & secret scanning.
- 🚫 Any violation of these protocols will result in revocation of access.

Fork the repository freely, but note that merging into `master` is strictly regulated.
